commands.review_summary:
The branch makes agent tool schema normalization and before-tool-call/abort wrappers preserve unreadable `parameters` descriptors for downstream diagnostics, with focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +62. Total +117 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main reads `tool.parameters` and spreads tool objects before the existing projection diagnostic path can quarantine unreadable fields. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer handling for a draft, protected-label PR and any broader validation before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve unreadable tool schemas through wrapping
target.body:
## Summary

- Leave unreadable tool `parameters` descriptors intact during schema normalization so runtime projection can quarantine/report bad plugin tools instead of crashing early.
- Replace object-spread tool wrapping in before-tool-call and abort-signal wrappers with a descriptor-aware execute wrapper that preserves hostile own descriptors and class/proxy-backed accessors.
- Add regression coverage for unreadable parameter getters through abort wrapping and class-backed tool accessors.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-vitest-next184-rebase1 nodenv exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-tools.schema.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `nodenv exec node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.schema.ts src/agents/agent-tools.abort.ts src/agents/agent-tools.clone.ts src/agents/agent-tools.before-tool-call.ts src/agents/agent-tools.schema.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Behavior addressed: unreadable plugin tool schema descriptors could crash schema normalization or wrapper construction before later runtime schema projection diagnostics could quarantine/report the bad tool.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree on Node via `nodenv`, rebased on current `origin/main`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest file, targeted oxlint, diff whitespace check, and branch autoreview commands listed above.

Evidence after fix: Vitest passed 43 tests in `src/agents/agent-tools.schema.test.ts`; oxlint exited 0; `git diff --check` exited 0; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings and `overall: patch is correct (0.84)`.

Observed result after fix: unreadable `parameters` getters survive normalization, before-tool-call wrapping, and abort-signal wrapping for downstream diagnostics; class-backed tool accessors remain readable after wrapping.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` could not run because `blacksmith testbox list --all` reported unauthenticated and AWS Crabbox returned coordinator 401 for `/v1/runs` and `/v1/leases`.
target.author: vincentkoc
